boat.name: Minelvia
boat.short_description: Minelvia was registered in Lloyds, 1953. She is a standard Hillyard 4 tonner built 1937 at Littlehampton.

for_sales.sales_text: Hillyard 4 ton gaff cutter built 1937 at Littlehampton. Pitch pine on oak. Moored at Holyhead during summer and stored ashore in a secure yard on it"s own cradle (included in sale) during winter where it is cleaned, painted annually. The 13.5 bhp Beta diesel was installed by and is serviced by Stuart Marine at Holyhead. Par marine toilet. Simrad tiller pilot. Kelvin Hughes VHF. NASA solar panel battery charger. All standing rigging renewed 2013. All running rigging renewed 2015. So, the boat is going well but the same can"t be said of the 1936-built owner who is reluctantly looking for a younger person to take over the helm.
